differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome due to IgA-associated glomerular disease
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) exacerbation
next_steps: Perform renal biopsy with Congo Red staining and immunofluorescence to evaluate for amyloid or monoclonal immunoglobulin deposition disease
Obtain spot urine protein/creatinine ratio or 24-hour urine collection for total protein
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain analysis to assess for amyloid cardiomyopathy
Obtain serum NT-proBNP or BNP levels
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with flow cytometry to investigate the M-component
Obtain serum albumin and comprehensive metabolic panel
Stool studies for ova and parasites given South American travel history
